items.description: Incident on I-76 West between the Reading Interchange Exit 286 and the Lebanon-Manheim Exit 266 blocking all lanes at mile 268. Motorists should use an alternate route to avoid major delays.
items.formatted: I-76 (Lancaster County) | Incident on I-76 West between the Reading Interchange Exit 286 and the Lebanon-Manheim Exit 266 blocking all lanes at mile 268. Motorists should use an alternate route to avoid major delays. Estimated Reopen: TBD
